description_long: This is a dark glass bottle with a tall, slender neck and a cork stopper at the top. The front features a large, ornate label with intricate designs and a central circular motif, possibly indicating a vintage or specialty beverage. The bottle's body is mostly opaque, with a deep, almost black coloration, and subtle marbling or textural effects visible on the surface. The label is cream-colored with brown and red accents, and appears to be paper affixed to the glass. The bottle is cylindrical with a slightly wider base for stability, and the cork is natural in color, fitting snugly into the neck. There are no visible signs of damage or wear, and the bottle exudes a classic, old-fashioned aesthetic.
description: A dark, opaque glass bottle with a cork stopper and an ornate, vintage-style label on the front. The bottle is cylindrical, with a tall neck and a decorative paper label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate label with detailed graphics and text, as well as the cork stopper.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's dark, marbled glass surface and the edge of the label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, opaque glass with no label or markings visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the bottle's cylindrical shape and a partial glimpse of the label.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large ornate label on the front with cream, brown, and red colors, featuring a central circular motif and decorative borders. Text and graphics are present but not fully legible.
